title: Introducing Cursor for iOS
summary: Cursor has released an iOS mobile app that enables building code from anywhere via always-on cloud agents or remote control of agents running on a user's computer. The app expands Cursor's IDE capabilities to mobile platforms.
writeup: Cursor introduces an iOS app that extends its IDE to mobile, letting coding agents run from anywhere. The app supports two modes: always-on cloud agents, and remote control of agents running on a user's own computer. This matters because it decouples agent-driven development from being at a desktop, moving Cursor's editor capabilities onto the phone.
